notes: 12 scenarios cover solution design, guardrails, evaluation design, failure-mode triage, governance-aware oversight, out-of-scope rejection, low-confidence escalation, and delegated meta-agent fallback.
All scenarios passed the 0.90 minimum pass-rate threshold with no unreviewed regressions.
Shared meta-agent fallback behavior and narrow specialty rejection were exercised in scenarios 9 through 11.
